goals.title: Project scaffold
goals.summary: Defines the initial package scaffold, typed schemas, JSONL archives, safety primitives, evaluator, and CLI surface.

goals.title: Code-improver loop
goals.summary: Runs the bounded propose, sandbox, evaluate, archive, and select loop for code-improver tasks.

goals.title: Research memory
goals.summary: Records structured research memory, including negative results, and retrieves it for later proposals.

goals.title: Promotion gates
goals.summary: Adds code-integrity, safety, reproducibility, and hidden-test gates before promotion.

goals.title: Meta-research loop
goals.summary: Adds the bounded outer loop that proposes reversible process improvements and validates them by fixed A/B benchmarks.

goals.title: Tiny-training autoresearch
goals.summary: Applies the same improvement loop to bounded pure-Python training configurations and validation loss.

goals.title: Provider abstraction
goals.summary: Introduces provider-agnostic model clients, tier config, and token/USD budget enforcement.

goals.title: Frontier research org
goals.summary: Runs the full model-backed research organization with typed roles, control-plane tools, and cross-model safety review.

goals.title: Research-shaped task suite
goals.summary: Adds research tasks, objective evaluation harnesses, reproducibility checks, and per-family summaries.

goals.title: Governance gate
goals.summary: Adds a default-deny human approval ledger for governed Tier 2 actions.

goals.title: Governed compute scale-up
goals.summary: Adds governed compute tiers, checkpointing, and guarded research evaluation with hard wall-clock and memory ceilings.

goals.title: Governed model-training
goals.summary: Adds governed offline weight-update experiments, artifact lineage, and separately approved deployment.

goals.title: Documentation consistency contract
goals.summary: Makes README, goal prompts, manifest entries, Self-improvement sections, and docs path privacy mechanically checked.

goals.title: Pricing audit and budget calibration
goals.summary: Adds config-level price override metadata, pricing-audit reporting, and ledger metadata for cost estimates.

goals.title: Hard resource isolation backend
goals.summary: Specifies a Linux/container hard-isolation backend with cgroup-backed resource limits and network denial.

goals.title: Durable research store and query layer
goals.summary: Specifies a storage interface and SQLite backend with migrations, lineage IDs, and JSONL compatibility.

goals.title: Research benchmark suite expansion
goals.summary: Specifies a larger benchmark suite, adversarial/noisy tasks, and richer cost-per-promotion summaries.

goals.title: Provider operations and observability
goals.summary: Specifies provider error taxonomy, bounded retries, request metadata, concurrency limits, and spend/latency reports.

goals.title: Governance identity and policy hardening
goals.summary: Specifies operator identities, signed approvals, policy templates, two-person approval, and ledger verification.

goals.title: Bounded operational pilot and cost-per-promotion report
goals.summary: Specifies a fixed, budget-capped pilot comparing local, cheap-frontier, and strong-frontier runs before scale-up.
